scripts.metrics: npm run metrics:parser && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run metrics:build && npm run metrics:project
scripts.lhci: lhci collect --config=./lighthouserc.cjs && lhci assert --config=./lighthouserc.assertions.cjs && lhci assert --config=./lighthouserc.budgets.cjs && lhci upload --config=./lighthouserc.cjs
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run metrics:parser && npm run test:unit && npm run lint && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run metrics:build && npm run test:e2e && npm run lhci && npm run audit:high && npm run metrics:project
